```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct DataResult {
    uint8_t data_type;
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;
};

DataResult preview_and_read_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a non-const buffer from the const span
    std::vector<uint8_t> non_const_buffer(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());

    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the non-const buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor, 0);

    // Use peek() to read the first byte (data_type) without advancing the read pointer
    uint8_t data_type;
    stream.peek(&data_type);

    // Check available data size using size()
    auto available = stream.size();

    // Read the item_count (uint32_t)
    uint32_t item_count;
    stream >> item_count;

    // Read the items based on data_type
    std::vector<uint32_t> int_items;
    std::vector<float> float_items;

    if (data_type == 0) {
        int_items.reserve(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            uint32_t value;
            stream >> value;
            int_items.push_back(value);
        }
    } else if (data_type == 1) {
        float_items.reserve(item_count);
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < item_count; ++i) {
            float value;
            stream >> value;
            float_items.push_back(value);
        }
    }

    return DataResult{data_type, std::move(int_items), std::move(float_items)};
}
```
